data.content: Implemented notification lightbox close-on-mark behavior by controlling popover open state and invoking markAllRead+close from the header action. Added unit test coverage for action ordering in notification-bell-actions. Validation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed commit 44782e4a81939f708c4d2e538628c19d31145ac2 to origin/main.
